content: I verified the merged state on GitHub: `#227` and `#228` are both merged, and the remaining open PR is only Emma's stale dirty `#226`. The current spreadsheet test surface passes, so I am treating the artifact as ready.

Please review and merge PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/229 targeting run/facebook/main. It isolates the orphaned column rewrite regression coverage onto a clean Carol branch after Henry's paste/redo fixes landed. Author: Carol
